framework.name: Four AI Failure Modes Framework
framework.description: Enterprise AI failures cluster into four distinct operational modes: (1) Pilot-to-Production Chasm (46% scrapped between POC and adoption), (2) Data Foundation Problems (65% lack AI-ready data, 60%+ abandoned), (3) Security Review Velocity Killers (6-12 month IT backlogs), (4) Cultural Resistance and Skills Gaps (54% cite cultural barriers, 15% actual adoption despite training).
framework.raw_quote: Four operational failure modes explain the gap... Failure Mode #1: The pilot-to-production chasm... Failure Mode #2: Data foundation problems... Failure Mode #3: Security reviews that kill momentum... Failure Mode #4: Cultural resistance and skills gaps

source.title: The four AI failure modes keeping marketing teams stuck - WRITER
